wrapper: bg-[var(--sbi-surface)]/95 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[var(--sbi-glass-border)] sticky top-0 z-50 transition-colors duration-150

nav.brand: text-xl font-bold text-[var(--sbi-text)] hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity duration-150

menu.item: text-[var(--sbi-muted)] hover:text-[var(--sbi-text)] px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-150

search.button: p-2 rounded-full transition-colors duration-150 text-[var(--sbi-muted)] hover:text-[var(--sbi-text)] hover:bg-[var(--sbi-glass-bg)]
search.form: absolute top-full right-0 mt-2 w-72 bg-[var(--sbi-surface)]/95 backdrop-blur-md rounded-lg shadow-xl border border-[var(--sbi-glass-border)] p-4 z-50
search.input: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[var(--sbi-glass-border)] rounded-md bg-[var(--sbi-glass-bg)] text-[var(--sbi-text)] placeholder-[var(--sbi-muted)] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--sbi-accent)] focus:border-[var(--sbi-accent)] transition-shadow duration-150

currency.button: flex items-center space-x-1 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-[var(--sbi-muted)] hover:text-[var(--sbi-text)] transition-colors duration-150
currency.dropdown: absolute right-0 mt-2 w-32 bg-[var(--sbi-surface)]/95 backdrop-blur-md rounded-md shadow-lg ring-1 ring-[var(--sbi-glass-border)] z-50
currency.option: block w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-[var(--sbi-muted)] transition-colors duration-150

language.button: flex items-center space-x-1 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-[var(--sbi-muted)] hover:text-[var(--sbi-text)] transition-colors duration-150
language.dropdown: absolute right-0 mt-2 w-40 bg-[var(--sbi-surface)]/95 backdrop-blur-md rounded-md shadow-lg ring-1 ring-[var(--sbi-glass-border)] z-50
language.option: block w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-[var(--sbi-muted)] transition-colors duration-150

cart.button: relative p-2 text-[var(--sbi-muted)] hover:text-[var(--sbi-text)] transition-colors duration-150
cart.count: absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-[var(--sbi-accent)] text-[var(--sbi-text)] text-xs rounded-full h-5 w-5 flex items-center justify-center

menu.wrapper: lg:hidden fixed left-0 right-0 bg-[var(--sbi-surface)]/95 backdrop-blur-md shadow-lg border-b border-[var(--sbi-glass-border)] transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out
menu.item: block py-3 px-4 text-[var(--sbi-muted)] hover:bg-[var(--sbi-glass-bg)] border-b border-[var(--sbi-glass-border)] last:border-0 transition-colors duration-150

cart.sidebar: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-full max-w-md bg-[var(--sbi-surface)]/95 backdrop-blur-md shadow-xl border-l border-[var(--sbi-glass-border)] z-[100] transform transition-transform duration-200 ease-in-out
cart.iconWrapper: w-8 h-8 bg-[var(--sbi-glass-bg)] rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center
cart.title: text-lg font-semibold text-[var(--sbi-text)]
cart.closeIcon: w-5 h-5 text-[var(--sbi-muted)] hover:text-[var(--sbi-text)] transition-colors duration-150
cart.emptyWrap: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 text-center
cart.emptyIconWrap: w-20 h-20 bg-[var(--sbi-glass-bg)] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4
cart.itemCard: group bg-[var(--sbi-glass-bg)] rounded-xl border border-[var(--sbi-glass-border)] p-4 hover:border-[var(--sbi-accent)]/30 transition-all duration-200
cart.itemImage: w-16 h-16 object-cover rounded-lg border border-[var(--sbi-glass-border)]
cart.qtyBadge: absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-5 h-5 bg-[var(--sbi-accent)] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center
cart.itemTitle: font-semibold text-[var(--sbi-text)] text-sm leading-tight mb-1 line-clamp-2
cart.qtyWrap: flex items-center gap-1 bg-[var(--sbi-glass-bg)] rounded-lg p-1
cart.qtyBtn: w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-[var(--sbi-glass-border)] rounded-md disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors duration-150 text-[var(--sbi-text)]
cart.removeBtn: p-1.5 text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 hover:bg-red-500/10 rounded-md disabled:opacity-50 transition-all duration-150
cart.checkoutBtn: w-full bg-[var(--sbi-gradient-accent)] text-[var(--sbi-text)] px-6 py-4 rounded-xl hover:opacity-90 transition-all duration-200 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center gap-3 font-semibold text-lg
cart.trustWrap: flex items-center justify-center gap-4 mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-[var(--sbi-glass-border)]
